ch.from: On Reveal: Steal 2 Power from the top card of your opponent's deck.
ch.to: On Reveal: Steal 2 Power from the top character of your opponent's deck.

ch.from: When this returns to your hand, randomly steal 4 Power from cards in your opponent's hand. Activate: Return this to your hand.
ch.to: When this returns to your hand, randomly steal 4 Power from characters in your opponent's hand. Activate: Return this to your hand.

ch.from: Ongoing: Your cards can't have their Power reduced.
ch.to: Ongoing: Your front-row cards can't have their Power reduced.

ch.from: End of Turn: If you have the highest Power among cards in play, give this and 2 cards in your hand +1 Power.
ch.to: End of Turn: If you have the highest Power among cards in play, give this and 2 characters in your hand +1 Power.

ch.from: On Reveal: Discard the lowest-Power card from your hand. Remove that card's Power from this.
ch.to: On Reveal: Discard the lowest-Power character from your hand. Remove that card's Power from this.

ch.from: On Reveal: Pull the lowest-Power card from your opponent's hand to their side of this location.
ch.to: On Reveal: Pull the lowest-Power character from your opponent's hand to their side of this location.

ch.from: On Reveal: Give the leftmost card in your hand +2 Power and -1 Cost, then copy it.
ch.to: On Reveal: Copy the leftmost card in your hand. Give the copy -1 Cost and +2 Power.

ch.from: On Reveal: Each player discards the lowest-Power card from their hand.
ch.to: On Reveal: Each player discards the lowest-Power character from their hand.

ch.from: The first time this moves to any location, destroy an enemy card there.
ch.to: Moveable once. When this moves to a location, afflict an enemy card there with -3 Power.

ch.from: On Reveal: Set the top card of your deck's Power to 8. If your other cards in play cost exactly 8 total, add it here. (0/8)
ch.to: On Reveal: Set the top character of your deck's Power to 8. If your other cards in play cost exactly 8 total, add it here. (0/8)

ch.from: When Discarded: Return in its next phase. On Reveal: Resurrect a card you discarded to another location with its Power set to 5.
ch.to: When Discarded: Return in its next phase. On Reveal: Resurrect a character you discarded to another location with its Power set to 5.
